CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2005 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-21-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: June Leathley.
Lucy B. Mejia, Esq. for Petitioner: Jose Enrique Ascencio, present as Guardian at litem for: Maria Elsy Ascencio Lobo, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $5,625.00
Medical Expenses $785.79
Lien $177.08
A net balance of $15,912.13 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, 270 Mission St., San Francisco, CA. 94110, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
